use_cases.name: Browse events
preconditions: At least one event is published
main_flow: Attendee opens an event to see its details and sessions

use_cases.name: Register for an event
main_flow: Attendee opens the registration form for an event
System records the registration as submitted
postconditions: A registration exists in submitted state

use_cases.name: Publish an event
main_flow: Organizer opens the event in the admin surface
System transitions the event to published

use_cases.name: Review registrations
main_flow: Organizer opens the registrations review list
Organizer confirms or waitlists each submitted registration
postconditions: Each reviewed registration is confirmed or waitlisted
